subject: sierra pacific power corp confirms for kern

emails.subject: Sierra Pacific Power Corp Confirms for Kern
emails.subject_base: Sierra Pacific Power Corp Confirms for Kern
emails.body: Sierra Pacific Power Corp Confirms for Kern Gerald, I have reviewed the netting language that was put into the confirms. Can you please send these to the attention of Lorelie Reid at SPPC for her review and we will get these documents executed. For now, we should still go with drafts. Call me if there are any questions. BT
